answers: Landscape basics: plan for sun/shade patterns, group plants by water needs, create focal points, and use layers (ground cover, shrubs, trees).
Backyard ideas: define areas (lawn, patio, garden beds), add pathways, use native plants for low maintenance, and include seating.
Design tips: use odd-numbered plant groupings, repeat colors for cohesion, consider all-season interest, and plan for growth.
Budget landscaping: start with a plan, add features over time, propagate your own plants, use mulch, and shop end-of-season sales.
